# GitHub Repo Topics (for discoverability)

GitHub repository **topics** are surfaced in search, in the repo card, and in
GitHub's "Explore" page. They are configured in the repo's **Settings → About →
Topics** field (not in any tracked file). This file documents the topics this
repo intentionally claims.

## Suggested topics for `armpro24-blip/aieng-freecad-mcp`

```
mcp, model-context-protocol, claude, anthropic, freecad, cad, cae, fea,
agent, llm, ai, calculix, step, bridge, adapter, tool-use, engineering,
design-automation, python
```

19 topics, well under the 20-topic cap.

## Suggested GitHub repository description

```
Composable FreeCAD MCP server — agent-facing bridge that exposes CAD/CAE engineering operations as Model Context Protocol tools, with an optional .aieng evidence layer for auditable LLM workflows.
```

## Suggested website field

```
https://github.com/armpro24-blip/aieng-freecad-mcp/blob/main/docs/mcp_runtime_tools.md
```

## Why these topics

- `mcp`, `model-context-protocol`, `claude`, `anthropic`, `tool-use` — the
  primary discovery vectors. MCP is a young protocol; ranking on the
  protocol's name + adjacent terms is high-leverage.
- `freecad`, `cad`, `cae`, `calculix`, `step` — the engineering audience.
- `agent`, `llm`, `ai` — the AI tooling audience.
- `bridge`, `adapter` — describes the architectural role accurately.
- `engineering`, `design-automation` — long-tail discovery.

## Updating these topics

When the project pivots or adds capabilities, update this file *and* the
GitHub repo settings together.
